title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Zoom toggle on charge case inside screen in QSG when tapping left circle button on fourth screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
Swipe to the fourth screen showing the charge case inside view.
Tap the left circle button on the screen.
Observe the zoom-in effect and new text appearing.
Tap the same left circle button again.
expected: Tapping the left circle button zooms in with new text appearing. Tapping it again zooms out to the original screen showing the charge case inside.
